title: Comely Adventure
description: Survive and Adventure in the beauty of the blocky world
body:
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Comely_Adventure/BH_ComAd_header.webp)
Comely Adventure isn't your average Minecraft modpack. We've hand-picked over 200 mods, both new and classic, to create a world brimming with stunning landscapes, perilous challenges, and a focus on streamlined, non-redundant features.

This isn't a "punch a tree and win" experience. You'll need to manage your stamina, energy, thirst, and even temperature as you explore a world with updated vanilla structures, new biomes, and a variety of dangerous creatures. Prepare for a longer, more engaging start to your adventure!
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Comely_Adventure/BH_ComAd_features.webp)
- Survival Focus: Manage stamina, energy, water, and temperature for a more immersive experience.
- World Revamp: Explore updated vanilla structures, captivating new biomes (both familiar and strange!), and a world dotted with challenging terrain.
- Enhanced Combat: Face more formidable foes and discover new ways to raid with features from Chococraft.
- Engaging Exploration: Encounter a wider variety of animals, weather systems with wind effects, and a revamped food system.
- Builder's Paradise: Dive into a treasure trove of tools and features specifically designed for creative players.
- Optimized Performance: Enjoy a smooth experience with compatibility for the Sodium performance mod (see link below for details).

![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Comely_Adventure/BH_ComAd_requirements.webp)
- Ram: +8GB
- GPU: [Sodium Hardware Compatibility](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium#hardware-compatibility)

![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Comely_Adventure/BH_ComAd_promo.webp)
